name: Marriott Bonvoy Bevy® American Express® Card

welcome_offer.description: Earn 175,000 Marriott Bonvoy bonus points after you use your new Card to make $5,000 in purchases within the first 6 months of Card Membership.

earning_rates.notes: 6x per $1 on eligible purchases at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy
First $15,000 in combined restaurant and U.S. supermarket purchases per calendar year; then 2x
First $15,000 in combined restaurant and U.S. supermarket purchases per calendar year; then 2x

annual_credits.name: Free Night Award
annual_credits.description: 1 Free Night Award after spending $15,000 on eligible purchases on the card in a calendar year. Award can be used for one night at a property with a redemption level at or under 35,000 Marriott Bonvoy points.

hotel_status.method: Automatic for as long as card is open

other_benefits: 15 Elite Night Credits per year (counts toward Bonvoy lifetime status)
